entity.label: Hukkok
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Decreed, a town near Zebulun, not far from Jordan, on the border of Naphtali (Josh. 19:34).

nodes.label: Hukkok
nodes.description: Decreed, a town near Zebulun, not far from Jordan, on the border of Naphtali (Josh. 19:34).

verses.text: And then the coast turneth westward to Aznothtabor, and goeth out from thence to Hukkok, and reacheth to Zebulun on the south side, and reacheth to Asher on the west side, and to Judah upon Jordan toward the sunrising.
